name: Chocolate Fruit Tart
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Vanilla wafer crumbs (about 45 wafers; crushed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare CHOCOLATE CRUMB CRUST.
1. Lightly butter a 12-inch pizza pan.
2. In a medium bowl, stir together crumbs, cocoa, and powdered sugar. Stir in melted butter. Press mixture onto the bottom and side of the prepared pan. Chill thoroughly.
2. Prepare the cream cheese filling:
1. In a bowl, beat the cream cheese and sugar until smooth.
2. Add cocoa, milk, and vanilla; beat until well blended.
3. Spread the mixture over the chilled crust.
4. Refrigerate until the cream cheese mixture is chilled.
3. Arrange fruit on top of the chilled cream cheese filling, working from outside to center until the surface is covered. Heat preserves until thin, then cool slightly. Spoon preserves over the fruit.
4. Refrigerate for 1 to 2 hours before serving. Cut into wedges. Makes 8 to 10 servings.
